ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone where the property is located */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the property (e.g., SFD, MF5plus) */,
  "hhID" INTEGER /* Household identifier */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "quality" INTEGER /* Quality rating of the property */,
  "monthly_cost" REAL /* Monthly rental cost of the property */,
  "restriction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restriction on the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "floor" INTEGER /* Floor number of the property */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building the property is in */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Usage of the property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "coordX" REAL /* X-coordinate of the property's location */,
  "coordY" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the property's location */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., available, rented, sold) */,
  "property_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property manager responsible for the property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_manager_id") REFERENCES property_managers ("property_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the zone */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the zone is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the zone is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type (e.g., SFD, MF5plus) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "min_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Minimum number of bedrooms for this property type */,
  "max_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Maximum number of bedrooms for this property type */,
  "min_area" INTEGER /* Minimum area for this property type */,
  "max_area" INTEGER /* Maximum area for this property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the building */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the building is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the building is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the building */,
  "num_floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the building */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the building was built */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenant */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the tenant is renting */,
  "tenant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the tenant */,
  "lease_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lease */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lease */,
  "rent" REAL /* Monthly rent */,
  "security_deposit" REAL /* Security deposit */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Payment frequency (e.g., monthly, bi-monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tenants_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the usage */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the usage */,
  "num_tenants" INTEGER /* Number of tenants during this usage period */,
  "total_rent" REAL /* Total rent during this usage period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_usage_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_restrictions" (
  "restriction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restriction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property with the restriction */,
  "restriction_type" TEXT /* Type of restriction (e.g., no pets, smoking allowed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the restriction */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the restriction becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the restriction expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restriction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_restrictions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., maintenance, repair) */,
  "person_responsible" TEXT /* Person responsible for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "cost_date" TEXT /* Date of the cost entry */,
  "monthly_rent" REAL /* Monthly rental cost */,
  "security_deposit" REAL /* Security deposit */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost (monthly rent + security deposit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_costs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_upgrades" (
  "upgrade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upgrade record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "upgrade_date" TEXT /* Date of the upgrade */,
  "upgrade_description" TEXT /* Description of the upgrade */,
  "upgrade_cost" REAL /* Cost of the upgrade */,
  "upgrade_type" TEXT /* Type of upgrade (e.g., renovation, repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upgrade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_upgrades_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_managers" (
  "property_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property manager */,
  "property_manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the property manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the property manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the property manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenant_complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint record */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant who filed the complaint */,
  "complaint_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was filed */,
  "complaint_description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tenant_complaints_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property where the request was filed */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was filed */,
  "request_description" TEXT /* Description of the request */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the request was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date the inspection was conducted */,
  "inspection_description" TEXT /* Description of the inspection */,
  "deficiencies_found" TEXT /* Deficiencies found during the inspection */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the deficiencies were resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_inspections_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
